generated_exposure.exposure_text: As a former counterterrorism analyst, I've seen firsthand how outdated security laws put us all at risk. The 2024 London attacks showed what happens when agencies can't share intelligence fast enough. We need to update our domestic security powers - it's not about surveillance, it's about giving professionals the tools they need to connect dots before it's too late. #NationalSecurityMatters
